summary: Tested 34 assertions: 34 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 203 tests in the test suite passed (exit code 0). Every assigned assertion has at least one directly corresponding passing test. VAL-STREAM-001 relies partly on generic Anthropic SSE translation tests since the Factory Claude integration test uses non-streaming mode, but the same code path is confirmed via routing.
